issues.description: Action sequence is incomplete. After trashing a card with [Trigger], the card must also REST the added DON!! card. Current DSL only includes GiveDon but is missing the Rest action.
TrashFromHand should be conditional (optional 'may'). The DSL does not reflect the optional nature of the effect.

Missing Banish passive effect. The DSL only covers the Attack trigger but omits the passive [Banish] effect that states 'When this card deals damage, the target card is trashed without activating its Trigger.'

suggestedDsl.description: Banish - When this card deals damage, the target card is trashed without activating its Trigger
